title: Humber Hydrogen Pipeline Project: section 35 direction, Planning Act 2008
body: "Direction by the Secretary of State related to the Humber Hydrogen Pipeline Project under the Planning Act 2008.  Date of decision  10 June 2025    Company / location   Humber Hydrogen Transmission System Ltd   Type of project  Hydrogen Pipeline / Section 35 Direction, Planning Act 2008. "
